Careers 
Administrator / Receptionist
Join a winning team – Tentnology is an international supplier to high profile special events and industry with innovative fabric structures.  We are recruiting for an important position – Office Administrator / Receptionist.

Successful candidates will be responsible for all reception and front office duties. You will be responsible for professional and positive representation of the organization through first impression. The successful candidate must be adaptable, creative, and proactive, enthusiasm and positive outlook supported by outstanding organizational skill and attention to detail.  To be successful, you must enjoy the use of technology; possess solid office software and documentation skills, with typing skill above 50 wpm.  Exceptional communication skills required. It is mandatory as well as above average skill in Access, Excel, PowerPoint and Word.

Based out of our Langley head office, we offer a fun-filled, fast-paced work environment supported by interesting and challenging global projects.

Interested candidates, please send us your resume and cover letter in confidence to:
Email: careers@tentnology.com
